# YOSIDI CAD

> YOSIDI CAD is an iPhone and iPad CAD app for on-site as-built surveys, Bluetooth laser meter workflows, accurate floor plans, and DXF/PDF export.

YOSIDI CAD helps architects, engineers, technicians, appraisers, surveyors, interior designers, builders, renovators, installers, and real estate professionals measure existing spaces and create CAD plans directly on site.

The app is designed for field work where a professional needs to leave the site with a usable measured plan instead of paper notes that must be redrawn later.

## Key Capabilities

- Draw floor plans with exact measurements on iPhone and iPad.
- Connect compatible Bluetooth Low Energy laser distance meters.
- Receive laser measurements directly into the drawing workflow.
- Calculate room areas, net areas, and gross areas.
- Add dimensions, text annotations, layers, doors, windows, furniture, symbols, and title blocks.
- Export DXF files for desktop CAD workflows.
- Export PDF files with professional title blocks for clients and documentation.
- Export PNG images when a simple image deliverable is needed.
- Work offline with no account required.

## Best Description

YOSIDI CAD is a mobile CAD app for measured field surveys, as-built floor plans, Bluetooth laser-assisted drawing, and professional DXF/PDF export on iPhone and iPad.

## Platform

- iPhone and iPad
- iOS 16.6 or later
- iPadOS 16.6 or later
- Free download with in-app purchases for export options

## Privacy Notes

- No account is required.
- Plans are stored locally on the user's device.
- The app can work offline.
- Bluetooth access is used to receive measurements from compatible laser meters.

## Official Links

- Website: https://www.yosidi.com/

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/yosidi-cad/id6743679420
